ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mills" (
  "mill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mill */,
  "title" TEXT /* Name of the mill */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the mill is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the mill is located */,
  "power_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power source */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mill type */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mill function */,
  "river_id" INTEGER /* ID of the river (if any) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Text description of the mill */,
  "construction_date" TEXT /* Date of construction */,
  "last_restoration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restoration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mill (e.g., operational, decommissioned) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the mill */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the mill */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the main image of the mill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mills_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES mill_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mills_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES mill_functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mills_river_id FOREIGN KEY ("river_id") REFERENCES rivers ("river_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mills_power_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("power_source_id") REFERENCES power_sources ("power_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mills_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Text description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_sources" (
  "power_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power source */,
  "power_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the power source (e.g., Wind, Steam, Electricity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Text description of the power source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mill_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mill type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mill type (e.g., Post mill, Roller flour mill) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Text description of the mill type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mill_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mill function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the mill function (e.g., Corn mill, None) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Text description of the mill function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rivers" (
  "river_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each river */,
  "river_name" TEXT /* Name of the river */,
  "description" TEXT /* Text description of the river */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("river_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the owner */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the owner */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the owner */,
  "description" TEXT /* Text description of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mill_ownerships" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "mill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mill */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of ownership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of ownership */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the ownership period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mill_ownerships_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mill_ownerships_mill_id FOREIGN KEY ("mill_id") REFERENCES mills ("mill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mill_maintenances" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "mill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mill */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance work */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mill_maintenances_mill_id FOREIGN KEY ("mill_id") REFERENCES mills ("mill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mill_restorations" (
  "restoration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restoration record */,
  "mill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mill */,
  "restoration_date" TEXT /* Date of restoration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restoration work */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the restoration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restoration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mill_restorations_mill_id FOREIGN KEY ("mill_id") REFERENCES mills ("mill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mill_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "mill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mill */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., image, PDF) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mill_documents_mill_id FOREIGN KEY ("mill_id") REFERENCES mills ("mill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mill_documents_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
